summary: Markets open the week cautiously bullish amid Hormuz crisis tensions boosting safe-haven gold and oil, while crypto shows resilience with Bitcoin eyeing breakouts despite low momentum; US CPI data and Fed policy uncertainty loom as key triggers. Precious metals lead gains, equities and majors like EUR/USD test key levels, and altcoin sentiment remains muted without fresh catalysts.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Bitcoin and altcoins expected to pop this weekend with potential trade setup.

signals.reason: Altcoin season potentially starting with specific trades outlined.
